SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 
LABEL: 
Servicing Provider NPI 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the health care professional who delivers or completes a 
particular medical service or non-surgical procedure. 
SHORT NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 
LONG NAME: SRVC_PRVDR_NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR

10

T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims
